publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2019-11-22 00:02:38 +0000.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: creator
origination.persname: Ashbery, Ray Stevens, 1902-1974 (Affiliation: (Cornell University Class of 1925)..)

did.physdesc: Correspondence, subject files, constituent bills, reports, case files, estates, wills, and income tax files.
did.abstract: Correspondence, subject files, constituent bills, reports and case files of Raymond Ashbery from his tenure as New York State Assemblyman. Also, correspondence, case files, estates, wills, and income tax files from Ashberry's private law practice in Trumansburg, N.Y.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, subject files, constituent bills, reports and case files of Raymond Ashbery from his tenure as New York State Assemblyman. Also, correspondence, case files, estates, wills, and income tax files from Ashberry's private law practice in Trumansburg, N.Y.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to correspondence and other papers restricted to the written permission of donor or heirs.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on use:
userestrict.p: Case files of Raymond Ashbery's private law practice in Trumansburg, N.Y made available with the understanding that the identity of individuals in these files is not to be made public for eighty years from June 6, 1977. When used in the intervening period, reference may not be made to individual cases.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Ray Stevens Ashbery papers, #3634. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Case files of Raymond Ashbery from years in office as a New York State Assemblyman made available with the understanding that the individuals named in the records may not be published or otherwise released in such form that any individual mentioned in the records can be identified.

controlaccess.subject: Politicians.
Lawyers.
controlaccess.corpname: New York (State). Assembly -- : Officials and employees.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Personal and law files, include papers related to Ashbery's private law practice, and businesses, i.e. "Film Libe" and real estate; also, "Ashbery for Assembly" campaign material.

did.unittitle: AFA Campaign Information on Other Candidates
Series II. Subject files, 1948-1962. Assembly files, arranged alphabetically by subject.
